task.desc: Add a created_at field to evidence-pack-template.json with placeholder value REPLACE_WITH_TIMESTAMP

l1.content: {"edit_description":"Add 'created_at' field with placeholder 'REPLACE_WITH_TIMESTAMP' to evidence-pack-template.json","target_files":["docs/05-OPERATIONS/evidence/evidence-pack-template.json"],"patch_commands":"sed -i \"s/created_at/created_at='REPLACE_WITH_TIMESTAMP'/g\" docs/05-OPERATIONS/evidence/evidence-pack-template.json","validation_commands":"grep -q 'created_at' docs/05-OPERATIONS/evidence/evidence-pack-template.json","expected_outcome":"Evidence-pack-template now includes a timestamp field for audit purposes","risk_notes":"No security risks","follow_up_type":"none|needs_review"}
